name: Apple Pie Filling (to Freeze or Can)
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend sugar, nutmeg, cornstarch, salt, and cinnamon together.
2. Add water and cook until clear.
3. Add apples and lemon juice, then cook until apples are soft.
4. Pack the mixture into jars or containers.
5. To make a pie, prepare the crust and bake it.
6. Place the thawed filling into the prepared crust and bake until warmed through.
7. A crumb topping of sugar, cinnamon, margarine, and chopped pecans can be added before baking if desired.
8. The thickener mixture (cooked flour, water, etc.) made enough filling for 8-10 large containers using 24 cups of apples.
9. Prepared pie shells worked well with this filling, even in a nonstick pot heated to medium or high temperature.
